item.title: AI Agent Type - Goal-Based Agents
item.description: Agents that evaluate actions based on whether they move toward a defined goal.
item.dc:creator: EdelConnect

item.title: AI Agent Type - Learning Agents
item.description: Agents that improve policies over time from feedback and experience.
item.dc:creator: EdelConnect

item.title: AI Agent Type - Model-Based Reflex Agents
item.description: Reflex agents with internal state to track partially observable environments.
item.dc:creator: EdelConnect

item.title: AI Agent Type - Multi-Agent Systems
item.description: Multiple specialized agents coordinated to solve complex tasks.
item.dc:creator: EdelConnect

item.title: AI Agent Type - Simple Reflex Agents
item.description: Rule-based agents that react only to current input, without memory.
item.dc:creator: EdelConnect

item.title: AI Agent Type - Utility-Based Agents
item.description: Agents that score outcomes and pick the action with the best utility trade-off.
item.dc:creator: EdelConnect

item.title: "Meta Muse Spark — multi-agent coordination in the spotlight"
item.description: Meta’s Muse Spark narrative underscores multi-agent coordination and “team-like” AI behavior—another step toward action-oriented systems.
item.dc:creator: EdelConnect

item.title: "OpenClaw and the rise of autonomous AI agents"
item.description: A new wave of systems is pushing from “chat AI” toward agents that plan, delegate, and act—raising both opportunity and operational risk.
item.dc:creator: EdelConnect

item.title: Beginner Lane — Your First AI Agent (No Technical Background)
item.description: Dummy lane for non-technical readers—plain language, visual workflows, and no coding assumptions. Real lessons will replace this outline.
item.dc:creator: EdelConnect

item.title: Tutorial - Build Your First AI Agent (2 Free Paths)
item.description: Two free paths to the same outcome—no-code (Flowise + Ollama) and code (Python + Ollama)—so you see that an agent is the system around the model, not the model alone.
item.dc:creator: EdelConnect

item.title: IT Practitioner Lane — First Automation Agent (Low Code)
item.description: Dummy lane for IT operators—integrations, runbooks, and light scripting. Full IT-style tutorials will replace this scaffold.
item.dc:creator: EdelConnect

item.title: Why AI Feels Smart... Until It Doesn't
item.description: A practical perspective on why AI systems look brilliant in one interaction and inconsistent in the next.
item.dc:creator: EdelConnect

item.title: The Claude AI Leak: What Happened and Why It Matters
item.description: Anthropic's 2026 leak exposed system-level AI engineering details and accelerated debate on security, governance, and operational risk.
item.dc:creator: EdelConnect
